pi_items.source: task.json description and export_result.sh TARGET_TITLE variable
task.json description and verifier.py tag checks
task.json description and export_result.sh UNIQUE_STATES grep pattern
No explicit word count check found in export_result.sh or verifier.py; verifier only checks character length

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a synthetic tiddler titled 'Case Study: Community-Acquired Pneumonia' with tags 'CaseStudy', 'Pulmonology', and 'Teaching'. It dynamically checks that the new tiddler has at least 800 characters and incorporates collapsible sections driven by state tiddlers under the prefix '$:/state/case-pneumonia/'. All case data is synthetic.
